root.sql: SELECT tax_date , tax_seq , c_text , ( '404A' || '|' || trim( (row_number() over ())::text) || '|' || c_text ) as c_tax from ( select sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_date ,sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_seq ,( sc_fin_send_tax_dep.id_card || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_dep.prename || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_dep.memname || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_dep.memsurname || '|' || right( '0000000000' ||sc_fin_send_tax_dep.deposit_account_no , 10 ) || '|' || pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_date ,'ddmmyyyy') || '|' || '15' || '|' || trim( to_char( sc_fin_send_tax_dep.paid_amount ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || trim( to_char( sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_amount ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || '1' ) as c_text FROM sc_fin_send_tax_dep WHERE 1=1 and paid_amount > 0 /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_date , sc_fin_send_tax_dep.tax_seq ) tb
